meta.description: Imperial faction deployment cards from Star Wars: Imperial Assault. All expansions included. Stats faithfully adapted from IA dice system to d6 dice pools. Regular deployments are Minion tier, elite deployments are Rival tier, unique villains are Nemesis tier.

ia-stormtrooper-elite.name: Stormtrooper (Elite)
abilities: Focus Fire: +1 damage when attacking a target already attacked this round.

ia-imperial-officer.name: Imperial Officer
abilities: Executive Order: Choose a friendly figure within Short range. That figure may perform an attack.
Commanding Presence: Imperial Minions within Short range do not flee due to morale.

ia-imperial-officer-elite.name: Imperial Officer (Elite)
abilities: Executive Order: Choose a friendly figure within Short range. That figure may perform an attack.
Inspiring: All Imperial allies within Short range recover 2 strain when this figure activates.
Commanding Presence: Imperial Minions within Short range do not flee due to morale.

ia-probe-droid.name: Probe Droid
abilities: Self-Destruct: When defeated, deal 4 damage to all figures within Engaged range.
Mobile: Can move through hostile figures.

ia-probe-droid-elite.name: Probe Droid (Elite)
abilities: Self-Destruct: When defeated, deal 5 damage to all figures within Engaged range.
Mobile: Can move through hostile figures.
Relay: Imperial figures within Short range gain +1 Accuracy.

ia-royal-guard.name: Royal Guard
abilities: Protector: When an adjacent Imperial figure would take damage, this figure may suffer up to 2 damage instead.

ia-royal-guard-elite.name: Royal Guard (Elite)
abilities: Protector: When an adjacent Imperial figure would take damage, this figure may suffer up to 3 damage instead.
Executor's Strike: +2 damage when attacking a Wounded target.

ia-royal-guard-champion.name: Royal Guard Champion
abilities: Protector: When an adjacent Imperial figure would take damage, this figure may suffer up to 3 damage instead.
Flurry: Perform 2 melee attacks as a single action (each with -1 damage).
Executor's Wrath: +3 damage when attacking a Wounded target.

ia-e-web-engineer.name: E-Web Engineer
abilities: Emplaced: Cannot take Move maneuvers. Must be set up at deployment.

ia-e-web-engineer-elite.name: E-Web Engineer (Elite)
abilities: Emplaced: Cannot take Move maneuvers. Must be set up at deployment.
Overcharge: Once per round, add +3 damage to an attack (suffer 2 strain).

ia-at-st.name: AT-ST
abilities: Massive: Occupies a 2x2 space. Cannot enter narrow corridors.
Armored Hull: Reduce all incoming damage by 2 (in addition to soak).
Trample: May move through hostile small figures, dealing 3 damage.

ia-general-weiss.name: General Weiss
abilities: Massive: Occupies a 2x2 space. Cannot enter narrow corridors.
Armored Command: All Imperial figures within Medium range gain +1 soak.
Assault Mode: As an action, perform 2 ranged attacks against different targets.
Trample: May move through hostile small figures, dealing 4 damage.

ia-darth-vader.name: Darth Vader
abilities: Brutality: Perform 2 melee attacks as a single action.
Force Choke: As an action, choose a figure within Short range. That figure suffers 4 strain and is Immobilized.
Deflection: When targeted by a ranged attack, add 1 Challenge die to the defense pool.
Parry: When hit by melee, suffer 3 strain to reduce damage by 5.

bossPhaseTransitions.narrativeText: Vader's rage intensifies as his suit sustains critical damage.

ia-heavy-stormtrooper.name: Heavy Stormtrooper
abilities: Heavy Armor: +1 soak against ranged attacks.

ia-heavy-stormtrooper-elite.name: Heavy Stormtrooper (Elite)
abilities: Heavy Armor: +1 soak against ranged attacks.
Suppressive Fire: Targets hit by this figure suffer +1 suppression token.

ia-snowtrooper.name: Snowtrooper
abilities: Assault: +1 damage on the first attack after moving.

ia-snowtrooper-elite.name: Snowtrooper (Elite)
abilities: Assault: +2 damage on the first attack after moving.
Focused Fire: Adjacent friendly Snowtroopers add +1 to attack pool.

ia-death-trooper.name: Death Trooper
abilities: Tactical Advance: After defeating a hostile figure, may immediately move up to 2 tiles.
Deathtrooper Conditioning: Immune to Fear and Suppression.

ia-death-trooper-elite.name: Death Trooper (Elite)
abilities: Tactical Advance: After defeating a hostile figure, may immediately move up to 3 tiles.
Deathtrooper Conditioning: Immune to Fear, Suppression, and Stun.
Coordinated Fire: +1 damage for each other friendly Death Trooper within Short range.

ia-riot-trooper.name: Riot Trooper
abilities: Riot Shield: +1 defense die against ranged attacks from the front.
Mobile Shield Wall: Adjacent friendly Imperial figures gain +1 soak against ranged attacks.

ia-riot-trooper-elite.name: Riot Trooper (Elite)
abilities: Riot Shield: +2 defense dice against ranged attacks from the front.
Mobile Shield Wall: Adjacent friendly Imperial figures gain +1 soak against ranged attacks.
Stun Charge: After moving adjacent to a hostile figure, that figure suffers 2 strain.

ia-jet-trooper.name: Jet Trooper
abilities: Fly-By: May move through hostile figures and obstacles.
Jetpack: Ignore difficult terrain and elevation changes during movement.

ia-jet-trooper-elite.name: Jet Trooper (Elite)
abilities: Fly-By: May move through hostile figures and obstacles.
Jetpack: Ignore difficult terrain and elevation changes during movement.
Strafing Run: +2 damage when attacking a figure you moved through this turn.

ia-sentry-droid.name: Sentry Droid
abilities: Patrol: When no hostile figures are in line of sight, move toward nearest objective.

ia-sentry-droid-elite.name: Sentry Droid (Elite)
abilities: Patrol: When no hostile figures are in line of sight, move toward nearest objective.
Alert: When a hostile figure moves within Short range, this figure may perform a free attack.

ia-hk-assassin-droid.name: HK Assassin Droid
abilities: Assassin Protocol: +2 damage against Wounded targets.
Calculation: May reroll 1 attack die per attack.

ia-hk-assassin-droid-elite.name: HK Assassin Droid (Elite)
abilities: Assassin Protocol: +3 damage against Wounded targets.
Calculation: May reroll up to 2 attack dice per attack.
Terminate: When this figure defeats a figure, recover 3 wounds.

ia-isb-infiltrator.name: ISB Infiltrator
abilities: Covert: This figure does not provoke attacks when leaving engaged range.
Intel: When this figure activates, you may look at 1 facedown mission token within Short range.

ia-isb-infiltrator-elite.name: ISB Infiltrator (Elite)
abilities: Covert: This figure does not provoke attacks when leaving engaged range.
Intel: When this figure activates, you may look at all facedown mission tokens within Short range.
Interrogate: After defeating a hostile figure, gain 1 bonus threat.

ia-wing-guard.name: Wing Guard
abilities: City Security: +1 defense die when within Short range of a door or terminal.

ia-wing-guard-elite.name: Wing Guard (Elite)
abilities: City Security: +1 defense die when within Short range of a door or terminal.
Detain: May spend 1 advantage to Immobilize the target.

ia-tusken-raider.name: Tusken Raider
abilities: Ambush: +2 damage on the first attack of the mission.

ia-tusken-raider-elite.name: Tusken Raider (Elite)
abilities: Ambush: +3 damage on the first attack of the mission.
War Cry: When this figure activates, hostile figures within Engaged range suffer 1 strain.

ia-wampa.name: Wampa
abilities: Ferocious: +1 damage for each wound this figure has suffered.
Stun Swipe: May spend 2 advantages to Stun the target.

ia-wampa-elite.name: Wampa (Elite)
abilities: Ferocious: +2 damage for each wound this figure has suffered.
Stun Swipe: May spend 1 advantage to Stun the target.
Ravage: When this figure defeats a figure, it may immediately attack another adjacent figure.

ia-sc2m-repulsor-tank.name: SC2-M Repulsor Tank
abilities: Massive: Occupies a 2x2 space. Cannot enter narrow corridors.
Repulsorlift: Ignores difficult terrain.
Mobile Firebase: May perform a ranged attack after moving.

ia-at-dp.name: AT-DP
abilities: Massive: Occupies a 2x2 space. Cannot enter narrow corridors.
Armored Walker: Reduce ranged damage by 1.

ia-captain-terro.name: Captain Terro
abilities: Mounted: Occupies a large base. May move through small hostile figures.
Flamethrower Sweep: May target all figures in a cone (Short range, 3 tiles wide).
Trample: Deal 3 damage to figures moved through.

ia-kayn-somos.name: Kayn Somos
abilities: Squad Command: All friendly Stormtrooper and Snowtrooper figures within Short range gain +1 damage.
Assault Formation: As an action, choose up to 3 friendly Trooper figures within Medium range. Each may immediately move up to 2 tiles.
Reinforcement Beacon: Once per round, reduce the threat cost of deploying Trooper groups by 1.

ia-grand-inquisitor.name: The Grand Inquisitor
abilities: Spinning Strike: Perform a melee attack against each adjacent hostile figure.
Force Throw: As an action, choose a figure within Short range and push it 3 tiles. It suffers 3 damage.
Dark Insight: Add 1 Proficiency die to defense pool against Force users.
Parry: When hit by melee, suffer 3 strain to reduce damage by 5.

ia-agent-blaise.name: Agent Blaise
abilities: Interrogation: When a hostile figure within Short range suffers strain, that figure suffers 1 additional strain.
ISB Authority: Once per round, choose a friendly Imperial figure within Medium range. That figure may perform an additional action.
Intelligence Network: At the start of each round, gain 1 bonus threat.

ia-general-sorin.name: General Sorin
abilities: Assault Command: All friendly Imperial Vehicle figures within Medium range gain +2 damage.
Bombardment: As an action, choose a space within Long range. All figures within 2 tiles of that space suffer 4 damage.
Iron Will: Imperial figures within Short range are immune to Suppression.

ia-emperor-palpatine.name: Emperor Palpatine
abilities: Unlimited Power: Force Lightning may target up to 3 figures. Make a separate attack against each.
Dark Side Mastery: All hostile figures within Short range suffer -1 to all attack pools.
Temptation: As an action, choose a hostile figure within Short range. Make an opposed Willpower check. On success, that figure performs a basic attack against an ally of your choice.
Force Barrier: Negate 1 hit per round (before damage is calculated).

bossPhaseTransitions.narrativeText: The Emperor's rage becomes terrible as his connection to the Dark Side intensifies.

ia-thrawn.name: Grand Admiral Thrawn
abilities: Grand Strategy: At the start of each round, choose one: all Imperial figures gain +1 speed, +1 damage, or +1 soak until end of round.
Predictive Analysis: Once per round, when a hostile figure declares an action, you may force it to choose a different action.
Art of War: All Imperial figures within Medium range may reroll 1 attack die per attack.
Contingency Plan: When Thrawn would be defeated, instead recover to 5 wounds and perform a free action (once per mission).

ia-maul.name: Maul
abilities: Whirlwind: As an action, attack each hostile figure within Engaged range.
Force Speed: May move up to 3 extra tiles after performing an attack.
Hatred: +2 damage against Force-sensitive targets.
Parry: When hit by melee, suffer 3 strain to reduce damage by 5.
Savage Ferocity: When wounded below half health, gain +1 to all attack pools.

ia-loth-cat.name: Loth-cat
abilities: Pounce: After moving adjacent to a hostile figure, may perform a free melee attack.

ia-loth-cat-elite.name: Loth-cat (Elite)
abilities: Pounce: After moving adjacent to a hostile figure, may perform a free melee attack.
Feral Frenzy: +1 damage for each other friendly Loth-cat within Short range.
